name: mail-mcp
description: Search, read, and send email via macOS Mail.app
long_description: Bridges Claude to Mail.app on macOS. Search uses Mail's own Envelope Index database for fast structured queries across all configured accounts (iCloud, Exchange, IMAP). Reads, replies, sends, and flag changes go through AppleScript automation against Mail.app, so the same connector works for accounts where messages aren't stored as local .emlx files. Requires Full Disk Access (to read the Envelope Index) and Automation access to Mail.app.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search Mail.app messages via the Envelope Index database with rich filters.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read full body of a message by its RFC message-id via Mail.app.

tools.name: list_accounts_and_mailboxes
tools.description: List all configured Mail.app accounts and their mailboxes with unread counts.

tools.name: list_recent
tools.description: List recent messages in a specific mailbox of a specific account.

tools.name: list_senders
tools.description: Grouped summary of senders in a mailbox with message counts and unread totals.

tools.name: get_unsubscribe_link
tools.description: Extract unsubscribe URLs from a message's List-Unsubscribe header and body.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a new email via Mail.app from one of the configured accounts.

tools.name: reply_to_email
tools.description: Reply to an existing message identified by RFC message-id.

tools.name: set_message_flags
tools.description: Set read and/or flagged status on a message by RFC message-id.

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move a message to a different mailbox by RFC message-id.

tools.name: bulk_mark_read
tools.description: Mark all messages in a mailbox and/or from a sender as read in one call.

tools.name: create_mailbox
tools.description: Create a new mailbox/folder in a Mail.app account.

tools.name: trash_email
tools.description: Move a message to Deleted Messages (trash) by RFC message-id.

tools.name: empty_mailbox
tools.description: Delete every message in a mailbox at once (Junk, Deleted Messages, etc.).

tools.name: list_rules
tools.description: List all Mail.app rules with their conditions and actions.

tools.name: create_rule
tools.description: Create a new Mail.app rule with conditions and actions.

tools.name: update_rule
tools.description: Update an existing Mail.app rule by its RuleId.

tools.name: delete_rule
tools.description: Delete a Mail.app rule by its RuleId.

tools.name: check_compatibility
tools.description: Probe each mail-mcp dependency and report pass/fail. Run after a macOS update.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Open a pre-filled GitHub issue for mail-mcp in the browser.
